heading: Usage
body:
```python
from langchain_mongodb.chat_message_histories import MongoDBChatMessageHistory

chat_message_history = MongoDBChatMessageHistory(
   session_id = "<session-id>",               # Unique session identifier
   connection_string = "<connection-string>", # MongoDB cluster URI
   database_name = "<database-name>",         # Database to store the chat history
   collection_name = "<collection-name>"      # Collection to store the chat history
)

chat_message_history.add_user_message("Hello")
chat_message_history.add_ai_message("Hi")
```

**Input:**

```python
chat_message_history.messages
```

**Output:**

```
[HumanMessage(content='Hello'), AIMessage(content='Hi')]
```

> **Note:** 
>
> - [Tutorial](langchain-memory)
>
> - [API Reference](https://langchain-mongodb.readthedocs.io/en/latest/langchain_mongodb/chat_message_histories/langchain_mongodb.chat_message_histories.MongoDBChatMessageHistory.html)
>
> - [LangChain Documentation](https://python.langchain.com/docs/integrations/memory/mongodb_chat_message_history/)
